passiveAbilities.name: Pick
passiveAbilities.description: If this character deals Slicing Melee Dmg, reduce the Dmg dealt by {Null}. If this character deals Imapct Melee Dmg, increase the Dmg dealt by +2.

passiveAbilities.name: Miner
passiveAbilities.description: When this model makes a Harvest action, gain possession of the Moonstone regardless of its depth value. This model ignores the Slow Carry rule whilst in possession of exactly one moonstone

passiveAbilities.name: Tough as Old Boots
passiveAbilities.description: At the start of the Replenish Step this model recovers 2 Wds.

activeAbilities.name: Shove
activeAbilities.description: Move target other model 2" directly away.

arcaneAbilities.name: Sink Hole
arcaneAbilities.description:
[P]X: Target suffers X Wds and gains [Slow. This model's jog actions are limited to 2"] until end of turn. 
Catastrophe: This character suffers 2 Wds.

signatureMove.name: Pick a fight
signatureMove.passiveEffect: Damagre from this attack cannot be reduced by passive abilities
